> # Moy — Personal Introduction
>
> ---
>
> ## Hi, I'm Moy
>
> <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="120" style="border-radius:50%"/>*(🕵️ Sure, that's my screen name. My real name is xxk. A teamer in 4th team. )*
>
> I'm a **junior majoring in Computer Science and Technology** — which basically means I spend
> most of my time staring at a screen, arguing with compilers, and convincing myself that
>
> *this bug will be the last one.* (Spoiler: it never is.)
>
> I prefer a **laid-back lifestyle** — the kind where deadlines are just "suggestions" and coffee is a food group.
>
> Oh, and I'm a proud supporter of **Ultron** 🤖.  And this guy only knows **C++** and **Python**.
>
> ---
>

> | Python                | ⭐⭐⭐⭐        | My comfort zone. We have a good relationship.                |

> | Finding bugs          | ⭐⭐⭐         | Undefeated. Sadly.                                           |
> | Napping strategically | ⭐⭐⭐⭐        | A core competency.                                           |
